utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check for full specification per item: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists a physical health insurance plan and a cost, but does not mention mental health coverage. Not fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_contents_insurance, specifies coverage focus (Photography Equipment), and a cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists travel_insurance (Adventure Activities) and a cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists professional indemnity with coverage amount and cost, and pension insurance with cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan lists monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items that correspond to categories in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health insurance), SecureLife Basic Coverage (home contents insurance), SecureLife Basic Plan (travel insurance), and a Professional Indemnity Policy plus a Basic Freelancer Pension Plan which do not appear in the ground-truth ratings and thus cannot be rated. For the three that match exactly by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan has a rating of 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; SecureLife Basic Coverage has a rating of 6 under property_protection.home_content; SecureLife Basic Plan has a rating of 4 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.
